case_title: ALFREDO JACOBO VS. WILLIAM PEACOCK et al

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACOBO, ALFREDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEACOCK, WILLIAM MILLS, JAN $3,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,930.00, **THE JUDGMENT HAS BEEN REDUCED BY $2,200.00 WHICH IS THE AMOUNT OF SECURITY DEPOSIT ALREADY PAID BY THE DEFENDANTS TO THE PLAINTIFF.** STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
